events.title: Diamond Grace supertanker runs aground, spilling crude oil into Tokyo Bay
events.description: On July 2, 1997, the Panamanian-registered supertanker Diamond Grace ran aground in Tokyo Bay and released crude oil. Reports described the spill as a major incident affecting coastal waters and cleanup operations in the Tokyo Bay area.

sources.headline: 4 million gallons of oil spill into Tokyo Bay
Supertanker Spill Fouls Tokyo Bay With Oil
Cleanup continues on downgraded Japan spill

key_quotes.quote: 4 million gallons of oil spill into Tokyo Bay
Supertanker Spill Fouls Tokyo Bay With Oil

dedupe.cluster_hint: Diamond Grace Tokyo Bay oil spill 1997-07-02

events.title: Truck accident spills de-icing compound into West Branch of Chester Creek, causing fish kill
events.description: A truck accident led to the release of about 350 gallons of a de-icing compound that entered the West Branch of Chester Creek and caused a fish kill. The incident is described in an EPA enforcement news release that references the July 11, 1997 spill.

location.name: Chadds Ford area (West Branch of Chester Creek), Pennsylvania, USA

sources.headline: News release (EPA enforcement) referencing July 11, 1997 spill

dedupe.cluster_hint: Chester Creek de-icing compound spill fish kill 1997-07-11

events.title: Ruptured truck fuel tank spills diesel into storm drain feeding Penitencia Creek
events.description: A truck with a ruptured fuel tank leaked up to about 200 gallons of diesel into a storm drain that flows to Penitencia Creek near the San Jose–Milpitas area. The report described impacts along miles of creek bed and noted wildlife contamination such as an oiled heron.

location.name: Penitencia Creek (San Jose–Milpitas border), California, USA

sources.headline: Up to 200 gallons of fuel spill in creek

key_quotes.quote: Up to 200 gallons of fuel spill in creek

dedupe.cluster_hint: Penitencia Creek diesel spill 1997-07-17

events.title: Diesel slick off Sharjah leads to temporary shutdown of Al-Layah (Al Liyya) desalination plant
events.description: A diesel spill off the coast of Sharjah in mid-July 1997 affected coastal waters and prompted authorities to shut down the Al-Layah/Al Liyya desalination plant while response efforts worked to contain and clean up pollution. Reports also mentioned contamination affecting nearby beaches in Sharjah and Ajman.

location.name: Coast off Sharjah, United Arab Emirates

sources.headline: Gulf: Diesel Spill On UAE Coast Affects Water Supply
UAE closes water plant after oil spill

key_quotes.quote: UAE closes water plant after oil spill

dedupe.cluster_hint: Sharjah diesel spill desalination plant shutdown 1997-07-13

events.title: Hurricane Danny makes Gulf Coast landfall and causes heavy rain and flooding
events.description: Hurricane Danny formed in mid-July 1997, reached hurricane strength, and made landfall along the U.S. Gulf Coast. The storm produced very heavy rainfall and flooding impacts across parts of the Southeast U.S., including southern Alabama.

dedupe.cluster_hint: Hurricane Danny (1997)

events.title: Fort Collins flash flood impacts Spring Creek after extreme rainfall
events.description: A slow-moving convective storm produced extreme rainfall over Fort Collins, Colorado in late July 1997. The resulting flash flooding caused severe impacts in the Spring Creek basin.

sources.headline: Utilities news item (Fort Collins flood history)

dedupe.cluster_hint: Fort Collins Spring Creek flash flood (1997)

events.title: Torrential rains trigger major flooding in Guangdong Province
events.description: News reporting in early July 1997 described torrential rains and major flooding in China’s Guangdong Province. Rivers reportedly overflowed, with widespread impacts and significant damage described.

dedupe.cluster_hint: Guangdong floods (July 1997)

events.title: Mw 6.9 Cariaco (Sucre), Venezuela earthquake (ISC 1036154)
events.description: A major strike-slip earthquake occurred in northeastern Venezuela near the Cariaco/Carúpano area. The event is indexed by the International Seismological Centre as event 1036154 and is the subject of subsequent scientific analysis.

sources.headline: Rupture history of the 1997 Cariaco, Venezuela earthquake from teleseismic P waves

events.title: Mw 6.8 offshore Coquimbo Region, Chile earthquake (ISC 1035633)
events.description: A strong offshore earthquake occurred west of Chile's Coquimbo Region. The event is indexed by the International Seismological Centre as event 1035633.

events.title: Mw 6.7 Guerrero–Oaxaca coast, Mexico earthquake (ISC 1037660)
events.description: A large subduction-zone earthquake occurred along the Guerrero–Oaxaca coastal segment in Mexico. The event is indexed by the International Seismological Centre as event 1037660.

events.title: Prescribed burns scheduled in Olema Valley (Point Reyes National Seashore)
events.description: Point Reyes National Seashore scheduled two prescribed burns in Olema Valley: an approximately 2-acre burn near Highway 1 south of the Fivebrooks Trailhead and an approximately 0.5-acre burn at Divide Meadow along the Bear Valley Trail. The plan noted potential temporary traffic delays during the burn operations.

location.name: Olema Valley, Point Reyes National Seashore, California, United States

sources.source_name: National Park Service (Point Reyes National Seashore)
sources.headline: News Release (prescribed burn in Olema Valley)

key_quotes.quote: scheduled in Olema Valley... a 2-acre burn... near Highway 1... and a .5-acre burn at Divide Meadow

dedupe.cluster_hint: Point Reyes prescribed burn Olema Valley July 1997

events.title: Wildfire reported in New Jersey Pine Barrens during July 1997 drought
events.description: An article reviewing the 1997 fire season reported that a wildfire in New Jersey’s Pine Barrens burned about 800 acres, damaged homes, and prompted evacuations amid drought conditions. The piece described impacts including home damage and resident evacuations but does not clearly present a contemporaneous incident report for a specific date.

location.name: Pine Barrens, New Jersey, United States

sources.headline: 1997 Fire Season Wrap-Up and Some Random Comments

dedupe.cluster_hint: NJ Pine Barrens wildfire ~800 acres July 1997

events.title: Wharton State Forest wildfire reported burning over 2,000 acres near Mullica Township, New Jersey
events.description: A UPI report said a wildfire in the Pine Barrens area of Wharton State Forest burned more than 2,000 acres and led to evacuations in nearby communities, with residents later allowed to return as conditions improved. The report described a multi-day response involving hundreds of firefighters.

location.name: New Jersey (Wharton State Forest / Mullica Township area), United States

dedupe.cluster_hint: Wharton State Forest wildfire 2000 acres July 1997 UPI

events.title: Indonesia fires reported contributing to early regional haze conditions (Kalimantan and Sumatra)
events.description: A FAO document describing the 1997/98 fires noted that burning in Indonesia (including Kalimantan and Sumatra) contributed to smoke and haze that affected air quality regionally. An additional Indonesia-focused source discussed responsibility and context for the 1997 fires, aligning with reports that haze became apparent during July 1997 as the crisis began building.

location.name: Indonesia (Kalimantan and Sumatra; regional haze across Southeast Asia)

sources.headline: FAO document page on the 1997/98 fires (AD653E)

dedupe.cluster_hint: Indonesia 1997 fires early haze July 1997

events.title: Vibrio parahaemolyticus outbreak linked to raw oysters harvested in the Pacific Northwest and British Columbia
events.description: A 1997 outbreak of Vibrio parahaemolyticus infections was linked to consumption of raw oysters harvested from Pacific coastal areas in the Pacific Northwest and British Columbia. The investigation discussed environmental conditions, including elevated water temperatures, as a contributing factor affecting shellfish-associated pathogen risk.

key_quotes.quote: ...outbreak of Vibrio parahaemolyticus... associated with consumption of raw oysters...

dedupe.cluster_hint: vibrio_parahaemolyticus_oyster_outbreak_pnw_bc_1997

events.title: EPA publishes final rules revising ozone (8-hour) and PM2.5 National Ambient Air Quality Standards
events.description: EPA published final Clean Air Act rules revising the ozone National Ambient Air Quality Standard to an 8-hour standard and establishing a fine particulate matter (PM2.5) NAAQS. The draft cites publication in the Federal Register on July 18, 1997.

key_quotes.quote: final rules revising the ozone NAAQS to an 8-hour standard and establishing ... PM2.5

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA NAAQS ozone 8-hour and PM2.5 final rules (July 1997)

events.title: U.S. Senate adopts Byrd–Hagel Resolution (S.Res. 98) on conditions for greenhouse-gas treaty participation
events.description: The U.S. Senate agreed to S.Res. 98 (Byrd–Hagel) by a 95–0 vote, stating the U.S. should not sign a UNFCCC protocol that omits binding developing-country commitments or would cause serious harm to the U.S. economy. The measure is recorded on Congress.gov.

key_quotes.quote: The Senate agreed to S.Res. 98 by a 95–0 vote

dedupe.cluster_hint: Byrd–Hagel Resolution adopted (July 1997)

events.title: FWS final rule extends jaguar endangered status to the United States
events.description: The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service published a final rule extending the jaguar’s endangered status to include the United States and addressed threats such as illegal shooting and habitat modification. The rule also concluded critical habitat designation was not prudent.

key_quotes.quote: published a final rule extending the jaguar’s endangered status to include the United States

dedupe.cluster_hint: FWS jaguar endangered status extended to US (July 1997)

events.title: NMFS interim final rule implements the Atlantic Large Whale Take Reduction Plan
events.description: NOAA Fisheries (NMFS) established the Atlantic Large Whale Take Reduction Plan via an interim final rule, including closures and gear requirements intended to reduce serious injury and mortality of large whales incidental to certain fisheries. The draft cites Federal Register publication on July 22, 1997.

key_quotes.quote: established the Atlantic Large Whale Take Reduction Plan ... to reduce serious injury and mortality of large whales

dedupe.cluster_hint: NMFS Atlantic Large Whale Take Reduction Plan interim final rule (July 1997)

events.title: EPA final determination finds Wyoming MSW landfill permit program adequate under RCRA Subtitle D
events.description: EPA issued a notice of final determination that Wyoming’s municipal solid waste landfill permit program is adequate to ensure compliance with federal MSWLF criteria under 40 CFR part 258. The notice states the adequacy determination is effective July 15, 1997.

key_quotes.quote: final determination that Wyoming’s ... landfill (MSWLF) permit program is adequate

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA adequacy determination Wyoming MSWLF program (July 1997)
